name: Lemon Bars Deluxe
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt. Set aside.
2. Pour condensed milk into a medium-sized bowl; add lemon rind and juice. Stir until smooth. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, cream butter and sugar together. Add the dry ingredients, beating until blended. Mix in the oats.
4. Sprinkle about half of the oat mixture evenly over the bottom of a 9 x 13 inch buttered pan. Pat to form a smooth, firm layer.
5. Spoon the lemon mixture over the oat layer and spread to make a thin, smooth layer.
6. Sprinkle the remaining oat mixture evenly over the lemon layer.
7. Bake in the lower third of a preheated 350°F oven for 30 to 35 minutes until lightly colored.
8. Cool in the pan; then refrigerate for 1 hour before cutting into squares.
9. Store in refrigerator.
